mainEntity.name: Step-by-step to claim directories for New York AI visibility?
mainEntity.text: Step-by-step to claim directories for New York AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. List top 20 directories (Avvo, Justia, NY Bar). 2. Claim/verify profiles. 3. Standardize NAP. 4. Add practice areas/reviews. 5. Implement schema. Repeat monthly.

suggestedAnswer.text: New York firms start with state bar, then legal dirs. Use Yext for automation. Post-claim, enrich with Brooklyn Supreme Court wins. Builds AI patterns in 60 days. Skip this, lose to competitors. Employers check these for vetting.

name: Directory Claim Process for NY Attorneys
